title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: CLATSKANIE MIDDLE/HIGH SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams, including sports physicals; treatment of illness and injury; vision, and blood pressure screenings; immunizations; mental health services; age-appropriate reproductive health; routine lab tests; prescription medication maintenance; and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 471 SW Belair Drive Clatskanie, OR 97016 Eligibility: Varies, call for information. Some SBHC are for students and staff only, others are for all children 0-19 in the school district, and others are open to the general public. Hours: Medical clinic: Tuesday/Thursday 8am-2:30pm Mental Health: Monday 8:30am-4pm, Tuesday-Thursday: virtual by appointment only (800) 244-4870 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (800) 244-4870 Main phone Main phone (800) 244-4870 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clatskanie School District SITE HOURS: Medical clinic: Tuesday/Thursday 8am-3pm every other Thursday 2:30pm Mental Health: Monday/Friday 8am-4pm Services: Childhood Immunization Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLATSKANIE MIDDLE/HIGH SCHOOL SBHC
